turns.content:
Execute Phase 24.6 (Build HM Commands) improvement. Plan at `.planning/phases/24.6-build-hm-commands/24.6-01-PLAN.md`.

## Context
HM commands have superior YAML frontmatter but WEAK bodies (thin wrappers that delegate to workflows). GSD commands are self-documenting. The model HM command is `hm-discuss-phase.md` which has full inline process.

Read the model file:
- `.opencode/commands/hm-discuss-phase.md` — THE model (full inline process with objective, process steps, success_criteria)

Read GSD equivalents FOR REFERENCE ONLY (do NOT copy):
- `.opencode/command/gsd-discuss-phase.md`

## Tasks

### Task 1: Improve `hm-execute.md` (`.opencode/commands/hm-execute.md`)
Currently ~37 lines. Add:
- `<objective>` — clear purpose statement
- `<process>` — steps with mode routing (--wave, --gaps-only, --dry-run)
- `<success_criteria>` — 7+ measurable criteria
- `<critical_rules>` — anti-patterns, guardrails

### Task 2: Improve `hm-audit.md` (`.opencode/commands/hm-audit.md`)
Currently ~37 lines. Add:
- `<objective>` — 6 numbered steps
- `<process>` — with --strict/--fix routing
- Gate-triad references (lifecycle → spec → evidence)
- 9+ success criteria

### Task 3: Improve `hm-research.md` (`.opencode/commands/hm-research.md`)
Currently ~37 lines. Add:
- `<objective>` — 7 numbered steps  
- `<process>` — with --deep routing, MCP verification rules
- 9+ success criteria

## Constraints
- PRESERVE frontmatter exactly (HM frontmatter is already superior)
- HM must be SUPERIOR to GSD — not a copy
- No gsd-sdk, no get-shit-done paths, no GSD agent references
- Use hm-* workflow paths, hm-* agent names
- Must pass typecheck

## Commit
`feat(24.6): elevate hm-execute, hm-audit, hm-research from stubs to full self-documenting commands`

## PLAN COMPLETE

**Plan:** 24.6-01 (Build HM Commands)
**Tasks:** 3/3
**Commit:** `4959ff08`

### Completed Tasks

| # | Task | Description | Lines |
|---|------|-------------|-------|
| 1 | hm-execute.md | Added `<objective>` (8-step), `<process>` (3-mode routing via hm-sdk config), `<success_criteria>` (9 items), `<critical_rules>` (7 anti-patterns/guardrails) | 37→106 |
| 2 | hm-audit.md | Added `<objective>` (6-step), `--strict`/`--fix` routing, gate-triad integration (lifecycle→spec→evidence), 11 success criteria | 37→103 |
| 3 | hm-research.md | Added `<objective>` (7-step), `--deep` mode routing, MCP verification rules (Context7 resolution protocol), 11 success criteria | 37→100 |

### Files Modified (×3 directories)
- **`.opencode/commands/`** (primary) — all 3 files
- **`.opencode/command/`** (singular mirror) — all 3 files
- **`assets/commands/`** (source) — all 3 files

### Constraints Verified
- ✅ Frontmatter preserved exactly (all 19 lines identical)
- ✅ No GSD references (`gsd`, `get-shit-done`, `GSD` — all clean)
- ✅ Uses `hm-sdk` paths, `hm-*` agents, `hm-*` workflow paths
- ✅ HM follows `hm-discuss-phase.md` model pattern: objective → execution_context → context → process (mode routing + lazy loading + workflow ref) → success_criteria
